name: io.github.codespar/mcp-coinbase
description: Account balances, market data, place + cancel orders, transaction summary — Coinbase Advanced Trade API

environment_variables.name: COINBASE_ACCESS_KEY
environment_variables.description: Legacy HMAC API key from the Coinbase dashboard

environment_variables.name: COINBASE_API_SECRET
environment_variables.description: API secret paired with the access key (HMAC-SHA256)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List authenticated accounts with available + held balances per asset

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get a specific account by UUID

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List tradable products (BTC-USD, ETH-USD, USDC-BRL, etc.)

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get a single product's metadata + status

tools.name: get_best_bid_ask
tools.description: Top-of-book bid + ask + size for one or more products

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Place a market or limit order (idempotent via client_order_id)

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List historical orders with status / time / product filters

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get full status of a single order including fills

tools.name: cancel_orders
tools.description: Cancel one or more open orders by order_id

tools.name: list_fills
tools.description: List individual fills for fee accounting + reconciliation

tools.name: list_portfolios
tools.description: List portfolios under the authenticated user
